feature_name: dameraulevenshtein(s1, s2, int id, int r, int t)
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, string1 VARCHAR(100), string2 VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, string1, string2) VALUES (1, 'MonetDB', 'DB3');
UPDATE test_strings SET string2 = 'MonetDB3' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT dameraulevenshtein(string1, string2, 1, 1, 1) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
